title: Automatic Data Processing (ADP) CEO, Carlos Rodriguez on Q4 2022 Results - Earnings Call Transcript
text: Automatic Data Processing Inc. (NASDAQ:ADP ) Q4 2022 Earnings Conference Call July 27, 2022 9:00 AM ET Company Participants Carlos Rodriguez - Chief Executive Officer Maria Black - President Don McGuire - Chief Financial Officer Danyal Hussain - Vice President, Investor Relations Conference Call Participants Bryan Bergin - Cowen Kevin McVeigh - Credit Suisse Bryan Keane - Deutsche Bank Tien-tsing Huang - JP Morgan Dan Dolev - Mizuho Mark Marcon - Baird Ramsey El-Assal - Barclays David Togut - Evercore ISI Samad Samana - Jefferies Operator Good morning. My name is Michelle and I'll be your conference Operator.

title: ADP Reports Fourth Quarter Fiscal 2022 Results
text: ROSELAND, N.J. , July 27, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- ADP (Nasdaq: ADP), a leading global technology company providing human capital management (HCM) solutions, today announced its fourth quarter fiscal 2022 financial results along with its fiscal 2023 outlook through an earnings release available on the company's website at investors.adp.com/events-and-presentations.

title: ADP revamping national employment report
